parsed_review.summary: CP00-830 is a Risk B, 40-unit descriptor-only continuation pack bridging RP27.P04 Secondary Workflow Slice tail (M04.S12-S22, 11 rows), the full Permission And Audit Binding micro-phase (M05.S01-S22, 22 rows), and the Synthetic Fixture Set head (M06.S01-S07, 7 rows). It does not overclaim: manifest production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, status=in_progress, and the descriptor-level production_ready_flag (platform_extensibility_ui_permission_audit_fixture_bridge_descriptor_verified) is supported by implementation, tests, the committed contract, and the no-write/runtime-closed boundaries. Baseline matches the live plan EXACTLY: docs/closeout-pack-plan/closeout-pack-plan.json packs[] has an explicit CP00-830 entry (line 397) with risk B, 40 units, range RP27.P04.M04.S12-RP27.P04.M06.S07, source_ledger_sha 13c7ed65, deviation_from_plan=false; this agrees with the frozen PLATFORM_EXTENSIBILITY_CP830_PACK_BINDING (registry.js:218), the manifest, the contract latest_pack, and the review baseline. Deliverable distribution {ui:17, implementation:11, fixture:2, test:2, hermes_evidence:2, claude_review:4, security_audit:2}=40 and micro distribution {M04:11, M05:22, M06:7} match the prompt, the requirements block (registry.js:847), and the manifest included_units (verified by hand-count). Implementation is coherent: registry.js defines binding/requirements/case-set/Hermes packet/Claude packet/closeout handoff/descriptor/contract projection; validators.js (1086-1213) enforces coverage drift, per-row descriptor_only=true / runtime_execution=false / no API-key|webhook|workflow secrets / no real client data|permission detail|audit body, plus no row opening runtime or writing permission/audit/product state, Hermes emits_runtime_receipt=false, Claude packet read_only=true, and correct handoff to CP00-831/RP27.P04.M06.S08; all CP830 symbols are re-exported via index.js export *; scripts/validate-rp27-platform-extensibility-contract.mjs is deterministic (reads JSON, validates, exits) with no runtime/writes. Three node:test cases (model.test.js:332/344/356) assert binding+coverage match the plan, descriptor stays runtime-closed (api_key_issued/webhook_delivered/workflow_executed=false, source_descriptor=CP829), and the contract projection keeps CP00-830 current. The committed contract (contracts/platform-extensibility-contract.json) sets current_pack/latest_pack=CP00-830, latest_projection descriptor, validation.valid=true, latest_pack_id=CP00-830, and a full no_write_attestation (descriptor_only=true; all runtime/write/real-data/secret flags false). Authority boundary holds: Claude is read-only (Read/Grep/Glob, read_only=true) and not final approver (claude_is_final_approval=false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true, runtime opening deferred to CP00-831); Hermes is deterministic control-plane only and not embedded in product runtime; enterprise trust not claimed. Review-hardening checks pass: auth preflight succeeded (exit 0, 1434-byte valid JSON result, non-zero stdout), tools limited to Read/Grep/Glob (forbidden_tools_present=false), all artifacts are valid JSON with required schema fields, prompt is 2515 bytes < 25600 limit, source_inspection_mode=read_tools_used (summary-only prohibited and not used). Downstream closeout artifacts (command-evidence.json, claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) and review-receipt.json/raw-output.json are not yet present — the expected pre-adjudication state, confirmed against the closed CP00-829 set (which flipped production_ready and production_ready_descriptor_verified to true only at closeout). Unrelated dirty files (progress-control-room, workbook docs, spec .docx) are correctly scoped out and contain no CP830 references. One P3 informational note records that validations were inspected structurally rather than independently re-executed (reviewer is read-only, no Bash). No P0/P1/P2. Verdict: PASS_WITH_FINDINGS; does not block pack closeout or this-CP goal closeout.

findings.title: Validation commands verified by source inspection, not independently re-executed; closeout-evidence files generated downstream
findings.details: As a read-only reviewer (Read/Grep/Glob only, no Bash), I verified the CP00-830 descriptor-only claim structurally rather than by re-running the 10 expected validation commands (npm run closeout-pack-plan:validate, closeout-pack:validate, npm test, npm run validate, spec:requirements:validate, weighted:validate, fullplan:validate, goal:closeout:validate, rp00:control-plane:validate, git diff --check). Structural verification covered: the frozen binding and CP830 requirements block in packages/platform/src/registry.js (lines 218 and 847); the case-set, Hermes packet (emits_runtime_receipt=false), Claude packet (read_only=true), closeout handoff (to CP00-831/RP27.P04.M06.S08), descriptor, and contract projection in registry.js; the coverage, descriptor, and contract validators in packages/platform/src/validators.js (1086-1213) including per-row descriptor_only/runtime_execution/no-secret/no-real-data guards; three CP00-830 tests in packages/platform/test/model.test.js (332/344/356); the deterministic validator scripts/validate-rp27-platform-extensibility-contract.mjs; the explicit live-plan entry at docs/closeout-pack-plan/closeout-pack-plan.json:397 (ledger SHA 13c7ed65, deviation_from_plan=false); and the committed contracts/platform-extensibility-contract.json (latest_pack/validation.valid=true/no_write_attestation). The downstream closeout-evidence files referenced by manifest.required_pack_artifacts and per-unit evidence_refs — command-evidence.json, claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json — plus review-receipt.json/raw-output.json are not yet present (only docs/closeout-packs/cp00-830/manifest.json exists, and artifacts/closeout-pack-claude-review/cp00-830/ has no receipt/raw-output). Manifest status is in_progress with production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, production_ready_descriptor_verified=false, and pack_level_claude_review.status=pending with empty valid_review_receipts — the expected pre-adjudication state; the closed pack CP00-829 contains the full 5-file doc set plus receipt/raw-output and flipped production_ready and production_ready_descriptor_verified to true only at closeout, confirming these are produced after this Claude review.
findings.recommendation: At adjudication/closeout, ensure the harness captures command-evidence.json (all 10 validation commands passing, including git diff --check) and construction-inspection.json, writes the hardened review-receipt.json from this review, and records exactly one valid pack-level Claude receipt before flipping production_ready/production_ready_descriptor_verified and committing — matching the CP00-829 artifact set. No code change required; this note documents the inspection-based verification scope.
findings.post_review_disposition: Informational only; does not block pack or goal closeout. Confirms the descriptor-only claim is supported by source inspection and that absent downstream evidence files are the expected pre-adjudication state.
